name: Palo Alto Networks
analysis: PANW's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 4% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $291.3100, stop $248.6385, target $419.3245 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
